chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D–951 of 2020 ( Javed Alam v. Federation of Pakistan & Others ) ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.22084/2021 2. For hearing of CMA No.4430/2020 3. For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 M/s. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali & Noshad Naz Khaskheli, Advocates for Petitioner Mr. Ali Ahmed Turabi, Advocate for Respondent Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General --------------- In compliance of order dated 16.07.2025, Counsel for the Respondents has filed Statement, which is taken on record. The same is reproduced as under:- “It is respectfully submitted by and on behalf of the Respondents that in compliance of order dated 12-02-2020 (Stay Order) the Office Order bearing No. SZIC/Esst/N.T/Dir/2019 dated 21-10-2019 (Compulsory Retirement Order) has not been acted upon. In the meanwhile the Petitioner has retired on account of superannuation on 01-12-2024 vide Offer Order bearing No. SZIC/Estt.Pen.N.T/2025-02 dated 03-02-2025. The Office order dated 21-10-2019 (Compulsory Retirement Order) shall not be acted upon and shall be deemed as withdrawn by the Office Order dated 03-02-2025 as the pensionary benefits have been released by the Respondents and received by the Petitioner.” Since the purpose of filing of the instant Petition is served out, therefore, the Petition is disposed of by directing the Respondents to pay the entire benefits, gratuity, commutation etc. within thirty days in accordance with law, if outstanding. The Petition stands disposed of along with pending applications.

The Office order dated 21-10-2019 (Compulsory Retirement Order) shall not be acted upon and shall be deemed as withdrawn by the Office Order dated 03-02-2025 as the pensionary benefits have been released by the Respondents and received by the Petitioner.” Since the purpose of filing of the instant Petition is served out, therefore, the Petition is disposed of by directing the Respondents to pay the entire benefits, gratuity, commutation etc. within thirty days in accordance with law, if outstanding. The Petition stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE FAIZAN/
